meta.title: Framer Tutorial | How to Use Framer to build a website (Full Guide)
meta.description:
Framer Tutorial & Review | How to Use Framer to build a website
Framer 👉 https://bit.ly/45yyE9N (Get 3 months FREE)
Use code: "partner25proyearly" to get a discount

In this step by step tutorial I'll go over how to build a website with Framer. Framer is a no code website builder that let's you create awesome animated websites. In this tutorial I show you how to get started with framer, I'll give you an overview of framer's UI. I'll show you how you can build a website using framer and I'll review framer.

00:00 Introduction
00:35 Framer UI Overview
02:05 Framer Templates
02:50 Navbar
04:25 Hero Section
05:37 Adding Animations
07:00 Framer AI tutorial
08:28 Pricing
